channel.title: Don't Hug Me I'm Scared
channel.description: Latest releases from Don't Hug Me I'm Scared on Dropout.tv

item.title: FAMILY
item.description:
Red, Yellow Guy and Duck meet adorable twins who teach them the importance of being part of a family.

Duration: 23:51

Tags: Don't Hug Me I'm Scared, puppets, education, cheerful, singing, weird, surreal, disturbing, bleak, cynical, absurd, chaos, gross, horror, dark comedy, meta, becky sloan, baker terry, joe pelling

item.title: DEATH
item.description:
Duck forgot to drink water so now he is dead. Some sort of blob turns up.

Duration: 23:46

Tags: Don't Hug Me I'm Scared, puppets, education, cheerful, singing, weird, surreal, disturbing, bleak, cynical, absurd, chaos, gross, horror, dark comedy, becky sloan, baker terry, joe pelling
